# cat Treehouse — Giveaway for Claude Max Subscribers

> Win a treehouse stay in Japan. Your GitHub stars are your lottery tickets.

## What is this?

cat Treehouse is a giveaway by Washin Village. 1 winner + 3 friends get a 3-day, 2-night stay in a CLT treehouse on the Boso Peninsula, Japan. Private car from Tokyo. All meals, forest sauna, rotenburo, and 16 rescue cats included. Flights to Tokyo not included.

## Who can enter?

Claude Max subscribers only. Subscription will be verified after the draw.

## How it works

Your total GitHub stars across all repos = lottery tickets. 10,000 stars = 10,000 tickets. We check via GitHub API automatically.

## Key dates

- Entries open: Now
- Entries close: May 1, 2026
- Winner announced: May 7, 2026
- Treehouse stay: June 7–9, 2026
- Code with Claude Tokyo: June 10, 2026

## Enter

Open an Issue at https://github.com/sstklen/cat-treehouse/issues/new?template=enter.yml

## Community events (open to all, ~$60 each)

- June 9 evening: TW×JP Claude Community Meetup (Tokyo)
- June 10 evening: Code with Claude Tokyo Livestream + After-party (Tokyo)
- Next: Claude Code Community Meetup in Taiwan (TBA)

Community events organized by TW×JP Claude Community: https://github.com/sstklen/claude-tw-jp

## Links

- Event website (EN): https://treeavel.washinmura.jp/cat-treehouse/
- Event website (ZH): https://treeavel.washinmura.jp/cat-treehouse/zh.html
- GitHub repo: https://github.com/sstklen/cat-treehouse
- Washin Village: https://washinmura.jp
- Treeavel (treehouse booking): https://treeavel.washinmura.jp
